steps.title: Solve the first equation
steps.content:
Use $10x=110$ to find $x$ by dividing both sides by $10$.
$$x=11$$

steps.title: Substitute into the second
steps.content: Now use this $x$-value in the second equation; the target is $y$, not $x$.

steps.title: Compute the coordinate
steps.content:
Substitute and simplify.
$$y=6(11)-63$$
$$y=3$$ The answer is D.
